div.head: The Ambassador in Honduras (Erwin) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 327. Reference Department’s 265, October 30, 9 p.m.See footnote 37, above. It became appropriate to clarify Salvador recognition in connection with general discussion with Foreign MinisterSilverio Laínez. today. The reason for precipitate action here was fact Honduran Government and present Salvadoran Government have a community of interest growing out of developments in Guatemala. Foreign Minister regards present Salvadoran regime as protection to Honduran borderFor correspondence on the border dispute between Honduras and Nicaragua, see pp. 213 ff. especially since it is expelling enemies of the CaríasTiburcio Carías Andino, President of Honduras. government who have been plotting in San Salvador.
The Honduran Government considers that the new Salvadoran regime acquired power through constitutional means.
